mapper.select: select monitor_id, device_id, voltage, current_a, soc, power_output, record_time from monitoring where device_id = #{device_id} order by record_time desc limit 1

select m.monitor_id, m.device_id, m.voltage, m.current_a, m.soc, m.power_output, m.record_time from monitoring m join ess_device d on m.device_id = d.device_id where d.member_id = #{memberId} order by m.record_time desc
select count(*) from monitoring m join ess_device d on m.device_id = d.device_id where d.member_id = #{memberId}
